programme.desc: Bangladesh v Australia. Coverage of the first ODI in the three-match series from Sher-E-Bangla National Cricket Stadium in Dhaka. Bangladesh have only ever beaten Australia once in ODI's, with that sole victory coming in a tri-series match in Cardiff 21 years ago.

programme.desc: Cleveland Guardians v New York Yankees (Start-time 6.10pm). Coverage of the American League match from Progressive Field. programme.title: Live: One Day International Cricket
programme.desc: Bangladesh v Australia. Coverage of the first ODI in the three-match series from Sher-E-Bangla National Cricket Stadium in Dhaka. The visitors have won their previous 14 completed matches in this format against their hosts, a run that stretches all the way back to June 2005. Bangladesh have only ever beaten Australia once in ODI's, with that sole victory coming in a tri-series match in Cardiff 21 years ago.

programme.title: ATP/WTA Tour Classic Matches
